metadata.description: Shell-level guardrails for Claude Code — command blocking, self-teaching, token economy, agent routing, MCP profiles, session memory, and code security scanning.

plugins.name: claude-supercharger
plugins.description: Installs the instructional layer: guardrails, token economy tiers, agent routing, anti-patterns, and compaction rules. For full protection (shell hooks, command blocking, notifications), run the install script.
